query: Vietnam population 2023 2024 United Nations World Bank estimate
answer: Vietnam's population was 101.0 million in 2024, a 0.6% increase from 2023, according to the World Bank. The United Nations estimates the population will reach 101.6 million in 2025.

results.title: Vietnam - Population and Demography Country Profile
results.snippet: ## What is the total population of Vietnam? ## What is Vietnam’s population growth rate *with* migration? In 2023, Vietnam’s population growth rate was 0.6%, and the chart shows how this has changed over time. ## How does migration impact Vietnam’s population growth? In the chart, you can see Vietnam’s population change *with* migration, next to a scenario where migration was zero. ## How does Vietnam’s population break down by age? The chart shows Vietnam’s population broken down by age, and how this has changed over time. ## How is Vietnam’s population expected to change in the future? Population projections rely on assumptions about how key demographic trends will evolve, particularly changes in fertility rates, life expectancy, and migration. The chart below shows how the population of different age groups is projected to change in Vietnam through to the end of the century. Explore global and national data on population growth, demography, and how they are changing.

results.title: Viet Nam Population 2025 - United Nations Population Fund
results.snippet: Total population in millions, 2025: 101.6. Population annual doubling time, years, 2025: 118. Population aged 0-14, per cent, 2025: 23.
